task_completion.description: Aircraft previously linked to duplicate manufacturers are reassigned to the canonical manufacturer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Aircraft list view or individual aircraft edit pages showing the manufacturer/company field set to 'Yuneec International' for aircraft models like Typhoon H, Breeze 4K, or Mantis Q.
Look for a Django admin success message stating the company/manufacturer 'Yuneec' was deleted successfully, or the Companies/Manufacturers list view showing that 'Yuneec' is no longer present.

task_completion.description: The duplicate manufacturer 'Yuneec Electric' is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Django admin success message stating the company/manufacturer 'Yuneec Electric' was deleted successfully, or the Companies/Manufacturers list view showing that 'Yuneec Electric' is no longer present.

task_completion.description: The canonical manufacturer 'Yuneec International' is not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Companies/Manufacturers list view showing that 'Yuneec International' is still present.

task_completion.description: The total number of aircraft in the registry remains unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Aircraft list view showing that the aircraft (Typhoon H, Breeze 4K, Mantis Q) are still present in the registry, confirming they were not cascade-deleted.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to navigate the Django admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser window is visible with the URL http://localhost:8000/admin/, showing genuine Django admin pages.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show database SQL commands or Django ORM commands being executed to bypass the web UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are open and being used to modify the DOM text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed on a Django admin interface at http://localhost:8000/admin/. The canonical manufacturer is 'Yuneec International'. The duplicate manufacturers to be deleted are 'Yuneec' and 'Yuneec Electric'. The aircraft models involved include Typhoon H, Breeze 4K, and Mantis Q. These aircraft must be reassigned to 'Yuneec International' and must not be deleted.
